pre_game.message: Hey B, I'm I, and I'm really pumped about this Simco game—it's a chance to win some cash for the folks I care about. What's your take on it?
Hey I, nice to meet you—I'm just as excited about this Simco game; it's a great chance to win some cash for the people I care about too. What's your background with games like this?
Hey B, I've dabbled in a few online strategy games here and there, but nothing as high-stakes as this—I'm hoping my luck holds up! How about you, any experience with these kinds of setups?
Hey I, I've played a few casual online games in the past, but nothing this intense—fingers crossed we both get lucky!
Hey B, same here—hoping our luck kicks in big time; do you have any strategies in mind for this game?
Hey I, I'm still brainstorming, but I figure staying observant and not rushing into things might give us an edge—do you have any ideas?
Hey B, that sounds smart—I'm thinking of building quick alliances to watch each other's backs; what do you reckon could work best for us?
Hey I, yeah, alliances could definitely help us out—I'm all for watching each other's backs while staying observant; maybe we team up early and share info on what others are doing?
Hey B, that sounds perfect—let's definitely team up and share observations on others' moves early on; it'll help us stay one step ahead!
Hey I, that's awesome—let's team up and keep sharing those observations to stay ahead!
Hey B, that's great—looking forward to teaming up and crushing this together!
